inputs.name: alterIcon
inputs.description:
Backup options to use when image hasn't been loaded successfully.
Options separated with "|" symbol.
Possible options: content, alt, backup, default-icon

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Aria-label for Avatar.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledby
inputs.description: Aria-Labelledby for element describing Avatar.

inputs.name: backupImage
inputs.description:
Backup image to load when image hasn't been loaded successfully.
Only applicable when using alterIcon input property.

inputs.name: border
inputs.description: Whether to apply a border to the Avatar.

inputs.name: circle
inputs.description: Whether to apply a circle style to the Avatar.

inputs.name: clickable
inputs.description: Whether component should be focusable & clicable

inputs.name: colorAccent
inputs.description:
A number from 1 to 10 representing the background color of the Avatar.
This property will override the colorIndication property.

inputs.name: colorIndication
inputs.description: A number from 1 to 10 representing the background color of the Avatar using the Indication Colors.

inputs.name: contain
inputs.description: Whether to apply background size contain style to the Avatar

inputs.name: font
inputs.description: Font family of the icon.

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: The glyph name.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Id of the Avatar.

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: Background image resource: url or base64.

inputs.name: interactive
inputs.description: Whether the Avatar should be interactive.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Localized text for label

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Whether to apply a placeholder background style to the Avatar.

inputs.name: random
inputs.description: Whether to apply random background color to the Avatar.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The size of the Avatar. Options include: *xs*, *s*, *m*, *l* and *xl*.

inputs.name: tile
inputs.description: Whether to apply a tile background style to the Avatar.

inputs.name: transparent
inputs.description: Whether to apply a transparent style to the Avatar.

inputs.name: valueState
inputs.description: Value state of the Avatar.

inputs.name: zoomGlyph
inputs.description: The glyph name for zoom icon.

outputs.name: avatarClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when avatar clicked. Only fires if clickable input property set to true.

outputs.name: zoomGlyphClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when zoom icon clicked. Only fires if zoomGlyph input property is set.
